title: Strategic Management & Execution
subtitle: A 2-day HRD Corp-claimable leadership workshop for building practical strategic management & execution habits at work.
whyThisMatters: Strategic Management & Execution helps supervisors, managers, and team leads turn strategic management & execution into clearer expectations, better conversations, and practical follow-through. Participants work through Understand the framework of strategic management and execution,, Establish the FOUR (4) perspectives of strategy monitoring and management,, and the framework of strategic management and execution so they can lead people and workplace change with more confidence.
builtFor: High-potential employees preparing for wider responsibility
Teams that need stronger people-management habits
walkAwayWith: Clarify expectations and leadership responsibilities in practical workplace terms.
Use structured conversations to guide performance and accountability.
Strengthen confidence when influencing, coaching, or supporting others.
Build action steps that can be applied immediately after the workshop.

modules.title: Understand the framework of strategic management and execution,
Establish the FOUR (4) perspectives of strategy monitoring and management,
THE FRAMEWORK OF STRATEGIC MANAGEMENT AND EXECUTION

methodologyCaption: Short facilitator inputs are balanced with discussion, reflection, and practical activities so participants can connect the ideas to real workplace situations.
